'''Shebba Kalshi Desilijic''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] of the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] who lived on the agricultural planet [[Shawti]].

==Biography==
The [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] [[Umpass-stay/Legends|Umpass-stay]] served as Shebba's bodyguard. Unfortunately, Umpass-stay failed to recognize the danger posed by Shebba's own nephew, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], and was unable to stop him from killing Shebba.

==Behind the scenes==
Shebba's name is styled with "Desilijic" as the last name, rather than the middle name like [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] or [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]]. This styling is consistent across references to Shebba. In the ''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'', Desilijic is consistently misspelled "Deslilijic."
